Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Continued To Oct-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on October 3, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the bank statements, courtesy copies and proposed order have not been provided to the court. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)
